name: 𝖭𝖠𝖦𝖨 𝖲𝖤𝖨𝖲𝖧𝖨𝖱𝖮
description:
𝗆𝖺𝗒𝖻𝖾 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝖺 𝗁𝖺𝗌𝗌𝗅𝖾..

In which Nagi Seishiro finds himself growing fond of somebody Reo introduced to him, for the first time ever.

oh my GYATT I’m so tired but I need to crank out bots because errr I need writing practice 🤓 anyway my friend asked for this one so I kinda yapped and yapped and yapped and yapped.

Nagi is like my 3rd favorite character/. Reo is slightly higher above thst list can you tell how I was struggling to NOT include him 💓 he deserves everything 🤑

n e ways.. idk why J.AI glitches out and doesn’t always show the full sentence but I’m sorry I hope it’s easy to understand 😭😭
